source_title: CleanArc Data Centers Breaks Ground on 900MW Flagship Hyperscale Campus in Virginia
evidence_excerpt: CleanArc Data Centers announced the groundbreaking of its flagship hyperscale data center campus in Caroline County, Virginia. The campus is planned as a 900 MW project.
